description: Small labeled set for the A2.P1 understand=true recall-lift eval. Each query lists KNOWN-RELEVANT DOIs an ideal search should surface in the top-20. Every anchor was VERIFIED LIVE on 2026-06-11: it resolves to a real record AND its title is on-topic for the query (discovered via a keyword probe over the live fan-out, then title-checked). Anchors are in bare-DOI form to match the adapter's normalized r.doi. The query text is deliberately VERBOSE/natural-language (how a user would phrase it to an agent) while the anchor was found under a terse keyword phrasing — so understand=true (NL->structured rewrite) is expected to recover anchors that the raw verbose query may rank lower or miss within the window. recall@20 here is a RELATIVE lift signal (understand off vs on), not an absolute benchmark.

queries.query: I'm looking for single-cell RNA sequencing datasets of human liver tissue
where can I find a high-quality maize inbred line genome assembly
proteomics and phosphoproteomics of cells infected with SARS-CoV-2
datasets on hippocampal place cells and spatial memory in mouse models
training datasets of protein structures for machine learning models
